ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role-permission mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user-role mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the login attempt */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the login attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the login attempt */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the login attempt was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token generated for the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Date and time the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Date and time the session ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the session was started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key for the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., MFA, API key) */,
  "token_value" TEXT /* Value of the token */,
  "token_expires" TEXT /* Expiration date and time of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_2fa_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 2FA method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of 2FA method (e.g., SMS, email, authenticator app) */,
  "method_details" TEXT /* Details of the 2FA method (e.g., phone number, email address) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the 2FA method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the 2FA method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., user activity, audit trail) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was generated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for generating the report */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
